data.current_description: Deletes a task by its internal ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a task from the system by its internal ID. Requires the task ID as a path parameter. This operation permanently removes the task record and cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation response. Any associated task assignments or notifications will also be removed.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important context for AI agents. It doesn't explain what happens to related data, what the response contains, or the permanence of the action. data.current_description: Creates and merges an invoice from a master template. Only for subscribers using Scheduled Invoicing.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new invoice by merging data into a master template. This operation is only available for subscribers with Scheduled Invoicing enabled. Accepts a CreateInvoiceRequest containing template parameters, matter details, and invoice line items. Returns the generated invoice object with invoice ID, amount, and status. The invoice is created in draft status and can be further edited or finalized.

data.current_description: Updates an existing task
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing task identified by taskId. Accepts an EditTaskRequest containing fields to be modified such as title, description, due date, status, or assigned user. data.current_description: Marks a task as complete. Returns the task state prior to completion.
data.description_suggestion: Marks a task as complete by updating its status to completed. Requires the task ID in the request body. Returns the Task object with its previous state (before completion) to allow tracking of state transitions. Completion may trigger downstream workflows, update matter timelines, or notify related users. The operation is idempotent - marking an already-completed task returns the same result.
